name: eating-animals
description: Jonathan Safran Foer's Eating Animals — investigative toolkit for understanding factory farming, its health and environmental impact, and the ethics of eating meat in the modern food system
useCase: Understand factory farming, make informed food choices, navigate ethical eating dilemmas, and recognize the public health and environmental consequences of industrial meat production
knownRisks: The book contains detailed descriptions of animal suffering that some readers may find disturbing
Foer is a novelist, not a scientist — the ethical arguments are stronger than the scientific ones
Some of the data (2009 publication) may be dated, though the systemic problems have worsened
